# Biological Sovereignty Protocol (BSP)

> The open cryptographic standard for health data sovereignty.

BSP gives individuals permanent, cryptographic ownership of their biological data — from genomics to wearables. Built on Arweave. Powered by SmartWeave.

## Core Concepts

- **BEO (Biological Entity Object)**: A permanent cryptographic identity anchoring a person's health data on Arweave.
- **BioRecord**: Standardized biological measurement format with 210+ biomarkers across 4 taxonomy levels.
- **ConsentToken**: Cryptographically signed, time-bound, revocable access grants.
- **IEO (Institutional Entity Object)**: Institutional identity for labs, platforms, and AI systems.
- **Exchange Protocol**: REST API for requesting and sending consented biological data.

## Specification

- Specification Overview: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/overview
- BEO Schema: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/beo
- IEO Schema: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/ieo
- BioRecord Schema: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/biorecord
- Exchange Protocol: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/exchange
- Governance: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/governance
- Biomarker Taxonomy L1: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/taxonomy/level-1-core
- Biomarker Taxonomy L2: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/taxonomy/level-2-standard
- Biomarker Taxonomy L3: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/taxonomy/level-3-extended
- Biomarker Taxonomy L4: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/specification/taxonomy/level-4-device

## Getting Started

- What is BSP?: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/what-is-bsp
- Quickstart: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/getting-started/quickstart
- SDK Reference: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/developers/sdk-reference
- Whitepaper: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com/whitepaper

## SDKs

- TypeScript: npm install @bsp/sdk
- Python: pip install bsp-sdk

## Links

- Website: https://biologicalsovereigntyprotocol.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Biological-Sovereignty-Protocol
- Specification: https://github.com/Biological-Sovereignty-Protocol/bsp-spec
